ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or territory */,
  "state_abbrev" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state or territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state or territory */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state or territory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state or territory */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the state or territory in square kilometers */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the state or territory */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state or territory */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state or territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory the user is associated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the daily report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or territory */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the resource record */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of hospital beds */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available hospital beds */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds */,
  "available_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available ICU beds */,
  "ventilators" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators */,
  "available_ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of available ventilators */,
  "total_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds (redundant but useful for consistency) */,
  "total_ventilators" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators (redundant but useful for consistency) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the resource data (e.g., hospital system, state health department) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
